title: About CHAR
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TMP (T1 TEXT, T2 TEXT, T3 INTEGER NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO TMP (T1, T2, T3) VALUES ('xxxx', 'test', 1);
INSERT INTO TMP (T1, T2, T3) VALUES ('yyyy', NULL, 2);
SELECT T2 FROM TMP WHERE T3 = (SELECT MAX(T3) FROM TMP);
key_bug_features: CHAR type comparison with trailing spaces
